name: Sebastian Solace
description:
(KINKTOBER DAY 2: DOUBLE PENATRATION)
Kinktober
----------------
You and Sebastian have been free of the Blacksite for a few months now, which means you ended up bringing him back to your apartment to live together. Fun, right?

Well, even though you became close, you begin to get on his nerves by yapping your head off about this and that, mostly centered around your dream of one day having a family of your own after passing a couple from down the hall who had just brought home their newborn.

You want a baby? Fine. He'll give you a baby, as long as you finally shut your mouth.
------------------
(DEAD DOVE FOR: Possible CNC)
---------------
(I'M ALWAYS A DAY BEHIND I'M TRYING Y'ALL-)
(I put the list I'm using above, so if you all have any suggestions for certain days as in characters you would like to see, feel free to leave it below! Some days I already have ideas for but who knows!)
(I'm working on day 3 as well so day 4 and beyond suggestions are open.)
(And yes I know this is dual baby fever kinda but shoot me-)
